div1.entryFree:
Spurn, subst. 1) a thrust, a stroke, a hurt: that which gives my soul the greatest s., is dear Lavinia, Tit. III, 1, 101. who dies that bears not one s. to their graves of their friends' gift? Tim. I, 2, 146.
2) a kick, an insult: the --s that patient merit of the unworthy takes, Hml. III, 1, 73.
